# Bibliography

- **vaswani2017**: Vaswani, Ashish et al. (2017). "Attention Is All You Need". *NeurIPS*.
- **devlin2019**: Devlin, Jacob et al. (2019). "BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers". *NAACL-HLT*.
- **brown2020**: Brown, Tom B. et al. (2020). "Language Models are Few-Shot Learners". *NeurIPS*.
